title: Punishment of 'Abbasid Missionaries in Khurasan
description: In this year, Asad b. 'Abdallih arrested a group of the missionaries of the Bang al-'Abbas in Khurisin, killing some, mutilating some, and imprisoning some. Among those arrested were Sulayman b. Kathir, Malik b. al-Haytham, Musa b. Kab, Lahiz b. Qurayz, Khalid b. Ibrahim, and Talhah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
